blocks.text: Title Race Showdown, Merseyside Derby, and Hovland at Hilton Head

Sunday delivers a stacked slate: Arsenal's 6-point lead over Man City is on the line at the Etihad, Merseyside erupts in derby fire, Viktor Hovland hunts leaderboard glory at RBC Heritage, and the Bahrain GP tightens the F1 title picture.
⚽ Arsenal at Manchester City — title-race crunch time, Arsenal lead by 6pts with a win needed to stay in control | 17:30
⛳ RBC Heritage Round 4 — Hovland trails leader Fitzpatrick (-17) in a loaded leaderboard; Scheffler lurks at -14 | 06:00
🏎️ Bahrain Grand Prix 2026 — Round 4, Antonelli leads Russell by 9pts as the 2026 F1 championship takes shape | 17:00
